headlines.headline: Urvel Grid warns of supply chain disruptions affecting Latin America operations

sentiment.reasoning: Repeated warnings of supply chain disruptions in Latin America suggest systemic operational challenges that will likely weigh on performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
